name: Graveyard Treat
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 cups of the cookie crumbs, 1/4 cup of sugar, and melted margarine with a fork in a 13x9-inch baking pan until crumbs are well moistened. Press firmly onto the bottom of the pan to form the crust.
2. Refrigerate.
3. Beat cream cheese and remaining 1/4 cup sugar in a medium bowl with a wire whisk until smooth. Gently stir in half of the whipped topping.
4. Spread evenly over the crust.
5. Stir boiling water into gelatin in a medium bowl for 2 minutes or until completely dissolved. Mix cold water and ice cubes to make 1-1/2 cups. Add to gelatin; stir until slightly thickened.
6. Remove any remaining ice.
7. Spoon gelatin over cream cheese layer. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until firm.
8. Spread the remaining whipped topping over the gelatin just before serving. Sprinkle with the remaining 1/4 cup cookie crumbs.
9. Decorate sandwich cookies to resemble tombstones using icing. Stand the tombstones on top of the dessert and add candies to complete the graveyard appearance.
10. Cut into squares to serve.
